game_name: Police Quest: In Pursuit of the Death Angel
sources_used: Wikipedia - Police Quest: In Pursuit of the Death Angel
note: T2 data tier: Limited audio/music documentation available. Wikipedia source provided game metadata (composer: Margaret Lowe) and development context, but contained no detailed information about music tempo, keys, chord progressions, track compositions, or SFX characteristics per area. Game originally used AGI engine (1987) with command-line interface; remade in 1992 with SCI engine and VGA graphics. Additional specialized audio documentation sources would be required to extract music composition details.
